description: Lock digital_payment_wallets to phone-based payment wallets using existing payment rails, not cryptocurrency wallets.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the 2011 Google Wallet U.S. launch on Sprint/Nexus S.
The scoped wallet is mobile phone software for NFC tap-to-pay and app-based payments.
Payment gateways and network acceptance are scaling infrastructure, not a hard software component of every wallet.
The node covers card/payment-network mobile wallets; cryptocurrency wallets are a different technology family.
